Conclave (2024)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $32,580,655Details
International Box Office $70,519,448
Worldwide Box Office $103,100,103
Further financial details...

Synopsis

Cardinal Lawrence is tasked with overseeing one of the world’s most mysterious and ancient events: the election of a new Pope. After the most powerful leaders of the Catholic Church from around the world gather in the halls of the Vatican, Lawrence finds himself at the center of a conspiracy and uncovers a secret that could shake the Church to its foundations.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$6,601,995 (20.3% of total gross)
Legs:4.93 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:31.6% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$20,000,000 (worldwide box office is 5.2 times production budget)
Theater counts:1,753 opening theaters/2,377 max. theaters, 5.5 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $34,378,912

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: October 25th, 2024 (Wide) by Focus Features
International Releases: October 31st, 2024 (Limited), released as Konkláve (Czech Republic)
November 1st, 2024 (Limited) (Poland)
November 7th, 2024 (Limited) (Croatia)
November 7th, 2024 (Limited) (Portugal)
November 7th, 2024 (Limited) (Netherlands)
Video Release: November 26th, 2024 by Universal Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: PG for thematic material and smoking.
(Rating bulletin 2845 (cert #54638(, 7/31/2024)
Running Time: 120 minutes
Award nomination: 2025 Oscars Best Picture Nominee
Award win: BAFTA Best Adapted Screenplay Winner, BAFTA Best Film Winner, Golden Globe Winner Best Screenplay—Motion Picture
Filming location (country): Italy, United Kingdom
Geographical setting: Vatican City
Plot point: Catholic, Pope, Religious
Subgenre: Psychological Thriller
Source:Based on Fiction Book/Short Story
Genre:Thriller/Suspense
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: House Productions , FilmNation Entertainment, Focus Features, Indian Paintbrush
Production Countries: United Kingdom, United States
Languages: English

Synopsis

Cardinal Lawrence is tasked with overseeing one of the world’s most mysterious and ancient events: the election of a new Pope. After the most powerful leaders of the Catholic Church from around the world gather in the halls of the Vatican, Lawrence finds himself at the center of a conspiracy and uncovers a secret that could shake the Church to its foundations.
